channel.title: How to solve these problem?
channel.description: I have a website that is [mistakes after knee surgery](https://thenewsbuster.com/top-5-mistakes-after-knee-replacement-surgery/) but facing a problem with it. I want to post my issue here but i don't know why my problem is not posting here.

item.title: How to solve these problem?
item.dc:creator: reyan7624
item.description:
I have a website that is mistakes after knee surgery but facing a problem with it. I want to post my issue here but i don’t know why my problem is not posting here.
